title: Xtra Spicy Jamaican Pepper Wrap
description: A pungent and molten Jamaican dish featuring sweet peppadew peppers, this low-carb-friendly wrap is perfect for midnight cravings. It combines the bold flavors of Jamaica with the convenience of a wrap.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a bowl, mix together jerk seasoning, scotch bonnet peppers, and lime juice.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and coat with the jerk seasoning mixture.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing it thinly.
In a pan, heat a little oil over medium heat and saute the sliced red onion until it is translucent.
Add the sliced peppadew peppers to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Warm the ssam wrap pieces by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few slices of the grilled chicken onto a ssam wrap, followed by some of the sauteed onion and peppers, and finally a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
